caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logos on the screen. He is wearing a green cap and headphones, suggesting he is either hosting or being interviewed. The setting appears to be a studio with a casual yet professional atmosphere, adorned with numerous framed photographs on the wall behind him. Another person is partially visible in the background, possibly assisting or also involved in the conversation. The man seems engaged, occasionally looking off to the side, perhaps interacting with someone off-camera or responding to a question. The environment includes clothing racks and shelves, hinting that the studio might be located within a retail space or a multi-purpose area.
